rules.Metamagic Feats: Empower Spell (+2 levels), Enlarge Spell (+1), Extend Spell (+1), Heighten Spell (variable), Maximize Spell (+3), Quicken Spell (+4), Silent Spell (+1), Still Spell (+1)
rules.Item Creation Feats: Brew Potion (CL 3+), Craft Magic Arms/Armor (CL 5+), Craft Rod (CL 9+), Craft Staff (CL 12+), Craft Wand (CL 5+), Craft Wondrous Item (CL 3+), Forge Ring (CL 12+), Scribe Scroll (CL 1+)
rules.Temporary ability damage: Heals at 1 point per full rest per ability per day

body:
# Core Mechanics — D&D 3.5 SRD Reference

Source: d20srd.org/srd/theBasics.htm and related pages

---

## The d20 Roll

**Attack roll:** d20 + BAB + STR mod (mel) or DEX mod (rng) + size mod + misc
**Skill check:** d20 + skill ranks + ability mod + misc
**Save:** d20 + base save + ability mod + magic bonuses + misc
**Ability check:** d20 + ability mod (no ranks added)

**Natural 20:** Always hits (attack) / always succeeds (skill, threat of crit on attack)
**Natural 1:** Always misses (attack) / auto-fails (save)
Natural 1/20 do NOT auto-fail/succeed skill checks in RAW 3.5.

---

## AC

**AC = 10 + armor bon + shield bon + DEX mod + size mod + natural armor + deflection + dodge + misc**

| AC Component | Applies vs. touch? | Applies flat-footed? |
|---|---|---|
| Armor bon | No | Yes |
| Shield bon | No | Yes |
| DEX mod | No | No |
| Natural armor | No | Yes |
| Deflection | Yes | Yes |
| Dodge | Yes | No |
| Insight / Sacred / Profane | Yes | Varies |

**Touch AC** = 10 + DEX + deflection + dodge + size (no armor/shield/natural)
**Flat-footed AC** = 10 + armor + shield + natural + deflection + size (no DEX/dodge)

---

## Size Modifiers

| Size | AC/Attack mod | Grapple mod | Hide mod |
|---|---|---|---|
| Fine | +8 | −16 | +16 |
| Diminutive | +4 | −12 | +12 |
| Tiny | +2 | −8 | +8 |
| Small | +1 | −4 | +4 |
| Medium | +0 | +0 | +0 |
| Large | −1 | +4 | −4 |
| Huge | −2 | +8 | −8 |
| Gargantuan | −4 | +12 | −12 |
| Colossal | −8 | +16 | −16 |

---

## Skills (Complete SRD List)

### Key Skill Rules
- **Synergy:** +2 bon when you have 5+ ranks in a synergistic skill (see each skill entry)
- **Armor Check Penalty (ACP):** Applies to: Balance, Climb, Escape Artist, Hide, Jump, Move Silently, Sleight of Hand, Swim, Tumble
- **Encumbrance** applies its own ACP on top of armor ACP for physical skills

### Core Skills (SRD)

| Skill | Key Ability | Trained Only | Armor Check |
|---|---|---|---|
| Appraise | INT | No | No |
| Balance | DEX | No | Yes |
| Bluff | CHA | No | No |
| Climb | STR | No | Yes |
| Concentration | CON | No | No |
| Craft (any) | INT | No | No |
| Decipher Script | INT | Yes | No |
| Diplomacy | CHA | No | No |
| Disable Device | INT | Yes | No |
| Disguise | CHA | No | No |
| Escape Artist | DEX | No | Yes |
| Forgery | INT | No | No |
| Gather Information | CHA | No | No |
| Handle Animal | CHA | Yes | No |
| Heal | WIS | No | No |
| Hide | DEX | No | Yes |
| Intimidate | CHA | No | No |
| Jump | STR | No | Yes |
| Knowledge (all) | INT | Yes | No |
| Listen | WIS | No | No |
| Move Silently | DEX | No | Yes |
| Open Lock | DEX | Yes | No |
| Perform (any) | CHA | No | No |
| Profession (any) | WIS | Yes | No |
| Ride | DEX | No | No |
| Search | INT | No | No |
| Sense Motive | WIS | No | No |
| Sleight of Hand | DEX | Yes | Yes |
| Speak Language | — | Yes | No |
| Spellcraft | INT | Yes | No |
| Spot | WIS | No | No |
| Survival | WIS | No | No |
| Swim | STR | No | Yes* |
| Tumble | DEX | Yes | Yes |
| Use Magic Device | CHA | Yes | No |
| Use Rope | DEX | No | No |

*Double ACP for Swim

---

## Feats: Key Categories

**Fighter bon Feats** (subset): Combat Expertise, Dodge, Great Cleave, Improved Critical, Power Attack, Spring Attack, Weapon Finesse, Weapon Focus, Weapon Specialization…

**Metamagic Feats**: Empower Spell (+2 levels), Enlarge Spell (+1), Extend Spell (+1), Heighten Spell (variable), Maximize Spell (+3), Quicken Spell (+4), Silent Spell (+1), Still Spell (+1)

**Item Creation Feats**: Brew Potion (CL 3+), Craft Magic Arms/Armor (CL 5+), Craft Rod (CL 9+), Craft Staff (CL 12+), Craft Wand (CL 5+), Craft Wondrous Item (CL 3+), Forge Ring (CL 12+), Scribe Scroll (CL 1+)

---

## Ability Score Increases

**Every 4 character levels** (4th, 8th, 12th, 16th, 20th): +1 to any one ability score
**perm ability damage** (ability drain): req: restoration or greater restoration
**temp ability damage**: Heals at 1 point per full rest per ability /day

---

## XP and Level Progression

| Level | XP (Standard) | Slow | Fast |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 0 | 0 | 0 |
| 2 | 1,000 | 1,500 | 750 |
| 3 | 3,000 | 4,500 | 2,250 |
| 4 | 6,000 | 9,000 | 4,500 |
| 5 | 10,000 | 15,000 | 7,500 |
| 6 | 15,000 | 22,500 | 11,250 |
| 7 | 21,000 | 31,500 | 15,750 |
| 8 | 28,000 | 42,000 | 21,000 |
| 9 | 36,000 | 54,000 | 27,000 |
| 10 | 45,000 | 67,500 | 33,750 |
| 11 | 55,000 | 82,500 | 41,250 |
| 12 | 66,000 | 99,000 | 49,500 |
| 13 | 78,000 | 117,000 | 58,500 |
| 14 | 91,000 | 136,500 | 68,250 |
| 15 | 105,000 | 157,500 | 78,750 |
| 16 | 120,000 | 180,000 | 90,000 |
| 17 | 136,000 | 204,000 | 102,000 |
| 18 | 153,000 | 229,500 | 114,750 |
| 19 | 171,000 | 256,500 | 128,250 |
| 20 | 190,000 | 285,000 | 142,500 |

---

## Carrying Capacity (Medium Creature, STR-based)

| STR | Light | Medium | Heavy |
|---|---|---|---|
| 10 | ≤33 lb | 34–66 lb | 67–100 lb |
| 12 | ≤43 lb | 44–86 lb | 87–130 lb |
| 14 | ≤58 lb | 59–116 lb | 117–175 lb |
| 16 | ≤76 lb | 77–153 lb | 154–230 lb |
| 18 | ≤100 lb | 101–200 lb | 201–300 lb |
| 20 | ≤133 lb | 134–266 lb | 267–400 lb |

For other sizes: Fine ÷8, Diminutive ÷4, Tiny ÷2, Small ×¾, Large ×2, Huge ×4, Gargantuan ×8, Colossal ×16
